name: roamly
description: Roamly AI Trip Planner — run both client and server together

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.start: npm run db:deploy --prefix server && npm start --prefix server
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm run db:generate --prefix server
